what_changed:
Security and stability hardening across the desktop client.

• Fixed API key wipe on Windows when DPAPI encryption fails — previous key is preserved and save reports failure instead of storing an empty secret.
• Hardened update installer helpers — reject unsafe shell metacharacters in paths, use private temp directories, and drop world-executable script permissions.
• Sanitized local video proxy response headers (Content-Type, Content-Length, Content-Range) to block upstream header injection.
• Added stream proxy concurrency limits, constant-time session token comparison, and token rotation when credentials change.
• Sanitized multipart upload filenames to prevent header/part injection.
• Capped unbounded network and cache reads (JSON APIs, thumbnails, offline store, upload queue, GitHub release metadata) to reduce OOM/DoS risk.
• Enforced a 4 GiB download size limit and safer image decode bounds (encoded size, pixel count, allocation limit).
• Re-validated Immich server URLs on load and save (HTTP(S) only, no embedded credentials).
• Fixed explore load dropping the first request error when parallel people/explore calls finish out of order.
• Validated person UUIDs and city filter length for explore searches.
• Capped offline library merge growth (max 5,000 assets).
• Sanitized download save filenames to block path-traversal suggestions from remote originalFileName values.
• Used secure QTemporaryFile names for clipboard paste uploads.
• Warned when connecting to a remote Immich server over cleartext HTTP.
• Removed AllowSetForegroundWindow(ASFW_ANY) from single-instance activation.
